messages.message: Custom fonts not added in `pages/_document.js` will only load for a single page. This is discouraged. See: https://nextjs.org/docs/messages/no-page-custom-font
Do not use an `<a>` element to navigate to `/events/`. Use `<Link />` from `next/link` instead. See: https://nextjs.org/docs/messages/no-html-link-for-pages
